title: Flea Treatment in Melrose, Bronx | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Melrose, Bronx. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Melrose home? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout the Melrose neighborhood of the Bronx. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every stage of their lifecycle, ensuring your family and pets can live comfortably again.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Melrose residents for years with reliable, affordable flea extermination services. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Bronx apartments and homes, offering same-day service and guaranteed results that keep your space flea-free.
localContext: Melrose's mix of pre-war walk-ups, multi-family homes, and proximity to parks like St. Mary's Park creates environments where fleas can thrive, especially in pet-friendly buildings. Our team knows the neighborhood well and works efficiently in buildings along Melrose Avenue, Elton Avenue, and the surrounding streets to protect your home from flea infestations.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Melrose?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Melrose typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination usually takes 2-3 weeks as our treatment targets adult fleas, larvae, and eggs. We include a follow-up visit to ensure all life stages are eliminated.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Melrose apartment during flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we recommend that all people and pets leave the premises for 3-4 hours during and after treatment. You'll need to remove or cover food items, and vacuum thoroughly before our arrival. We'll provide detailed preparation instructions when you book.

faqs.question: Can fleas return after treatment in my Bronx home?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatments come with a 30-day warranty. If fleas return within this period, we'll re-treat at no additional cost. To prevent future infestations, we recommend regular pet treatments from your veterinarian and periodic vacuuming of carpets and upholstery.
